summary: Completed the ADR 0119 latest-main live apply by replaying Windmill from the rebased mainline integration worktree, hardening the seed-sync and worker-checkout durability path, removing the duplicate scheduler watchdog loop manifest entry, and re-verifying the dispatcher, lane scheduler, watchdog, and watchdog loop against the live production workspace.

verification.observed: `uv run --with pytest python -m pytest -q tests/test_config_merge_repo_surfaces.py tests/test_config_merge_windmill.py tests/test_windmill_operator_admin_app.py tests/test_windmill_circuit_clients.py` passed with `47 passed`, `python3 -m py_compile scripts/sync_windmill_seed_scripts.py scripts/windmill_run_wait_result.py platform/scheduler/scheduler.py` passed, `ansible-playbook -i inventory/hosts.yml playbooks/windmill.yml --syntax-check` passed, and `uvx --from ansible-lint ansible-lint collections/ansible_collections/lv3/platform/roles/windmill_runtime` completed with non-fatal warnings only.

After rebasing onto the newer `origin/main`, `ansible-playbook -i inventory/hosts.yml playbooks/windmill.yml --private-key .local/ssh/hetzner_llm_agents_ed25519 -e proxmox_guest_ssh_connection_mode=proxmox_host_jump --limit docker-runtime-lv3` completed successfully with `docker-runtime-lv3 : ok=216 changed=38 unreachable=0 failed=0`.

verification.check: Live script parity and schedule state
verification.observed: The live Windmill API script bodies for `f/lv3/intent_queue_dispatcher`, `f/lv3/lane_scheduler`, `f/lv3/scheduler_watchdog`, and `f/lv3/scheduler_watchdog_loop` matched the checked-in sources byte-for-byte, and schedules `f/lv3/intent_queue_dispatcher_every_minute`, `f/lv3/lane_scheduler_every_2s`, `f/lv3/scheduler_watchdog_every_30s`, and `f/lv3/scheduler_watchdog_loop_every_10s` were all enabled.

On `docker-runtime-lv3`, the rendered Windmill runtime env exposed `LV3_WINDMILL_BASE_URL` and `LV3_WINDMILL_TOKEN`, and the mirrored worker checkout secret file remained present at `/srv/platform_server/.local/windmill/superadmin-secret.txt` after the replay.

notes: This latest-main replay was rerun after `origin/main` advanced for ADR 0183 so the verified live apply corresponds to the exact rebased mainline branch that records repository version `0.177.10`.

The live proof caught and fixed a real scheduler seed regression: `windmill_seed_scripts` had two entries for `f/lv3/scheduler_watchdog_loop`, which caused the watchdog implementation body to overwrite the wrapper script during sync.
The first mainline release that records this verified live state is repository version `0.177.10` with platform version `0.130.30`.
